title: Carpet GUGU Addition
description: A Carpet mod (fabric-carpet) extension that contains some useful or useless functions and some functions that I want but are not included.
body:
A Carpet Mod (fabric-carpet) extension that contains some useful or useless functions and some functions that I want but are not included
Under the default configuration conditions, this mod will not change any vanilla behavior at all
Use with carpet mod in the same Minecraft version. Use newer carpet mod versions whenever possible For more details of the mod, see the document here https://github.com/DaCong114514qwq/Carpet-GUGU-Addition

Key Features:
Adjusts the hardness of blocks such as the Trial Generator, Vault, and Reinforced Deepstone to make them easier to mine.
Automatic experience repair: uses existing experience to repair equipment, ideal for survival mode.
Remote Item Retrieval: Provides server support for the modified Litematica Printer mod ([BiliXWhite/litematica-printer](https://github.com/BiliXWhite/litematica-printer) or [zhaixianyu/litematica-printer](https://github.com/zhaixianyu/litematica-printer)), enabling the remote retrieval of items from containers.
For more useful features, use the command “/carpet list GUGU” to view the list.

For more features, please visit https://github.com/DaCong114514qwq/Carpet-GUGU-Addition/blob/main/Rules.md.
